page_metadata.biotools__summary: TUPDB (Target-Unrelated Peptide Data Bank) is a comprehensive database of target-unrelated peptides (TUPs) and TUP motifs. It contains extensive information extracted from research articles and public databases.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: TUPDB (Target-Unrelated Peptide Data Bank) is a comprehensive database of target-unrelated peptides (TUPs) and TUP motifs. It contains extensive information extracted from research articles and public databases.
